\n
\n

Practise the answer before the conversation

\n

Answerable helps regular Christians, small groups and evangelical teams prepare for hard questions with model answers, Scripture-led study and realistic conversation practice.

\n
\n Get the app →\n See how it works\n
\n
\n ✦ App-based practice\n ✦ Gracious conversation training\n ✦ Scripture-led study\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n
Practice mode
\n
Answer first, then compare with a model response.
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n
\n Why does God allow suffering?✦\n How can you trust the Bible?✦\n Isn't faith opposed to science?✦\n What about other religions?✦\n Did the resurrection really happen?✦\n Why would a good God send people to hell?✦\n

\n Why does God allow suffering?✦\n How can you trust the Bible?✦\n Isn't faith opposed to science?✦\n What about other religions?✦\n Did the resurrection really happen?✦\n Why would a good God send people to hell?✦\n

\n\n \n
\n
\n 01\n The method\n
\n
\n

How the training works

\n

Practise the flow you want in real conversations: face a real question, answer before peeking, then review with Scripture, context and a model response.

\n
\n
\n
\n
1
\n

Face a question

\n

Start with a real apologetics question across doctrine, Scripture, ethics, philosophy and evangelism.

\n
\n
\n
2
\n

Try your answer

\n

Form your own response before you reveal the model answer.

\n
\n
\n
3
\n

Review with care

\n

Return to Scripture, strengthen the answer and learn how to say it with grace.

\n
\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n 02\n Featured\n
\n

Practice Mode

\n

Practise focused questions with helpful context and model responses drawn from the app's apologetics training.

\n
    \n
  • ✓ Questions regular Christians actually face
    • \n
  • ✓ Answer before you read
    • \n
  • ✓ Compare with model responses
    • \n
  • ✓ Return to Scripture with clarity
    • \n
\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n 03\n Featured\n
\n

Conversation Partners

\n

Practise with realistic conversation partners, not just prompts. Prepare for different beliefs, temperaments and objections.

\n
    \n
  • ✓ Prepare for realistic conversations
    • \n
  • ✓ Respond with patience and clarity
    • \n
  • ✓ Avoid trying to win arguments
    • \n
  • ✓ Build confidence to love and speak well
    • \n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
✦
\n

Built to help Christians answer with clarity, patience and grace — not to win arguments.

\n
\n\n \n
\n

\n
\n

Inside the app

\n

Real app screens for Home, Practice, Partners, Scripture Study, Library and Test Yourself.

\n\n \n
\n
\n 05\n FAQ\n
\n
\n
\n

Frequently asked questions

\n

Quick answers for Christians, churches and groups deciding whether Answerable Faith is for them.

\n
\n
\n
\n

What is Answerable Faith?

\n

A Christian apologetics training app for practising thoughtful, Scripture-led answers to real questions.

\n
\n
\n

Who is it for?

\n

Regular Christians, evangelical groups, small groups, youth and student ministries, and churches that want to answer with confidence and grace.

\n
\n
\n

How do conversation partners work?

\n

Partners represent different beliefs, temperaments and objections so you can practise realistic conversations before they happen.

\n
\n
\n

How can I contact you?

\n

Use the contact page or email support@answerablefaith.com.

\n
\n
\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n

\n
